title: Lessons from the 2026 Dubai Marina Signal Heists
excerpt: Three separate operators. Same anomaly pattern. None connected on paper. When fraud methodology migrates faster than audit methodology, the investigation always starts too late — and at the wrong company.

title: The Inventory Maze (Supply Chain)
excerpt: The inventory variance wasn't a theft problem — it was a measurement problem that created a theft opportunity. How a supply chain audit turned into a controls architecture rebuild because the data model was wrong from the start.

title: Why Data Cleaning Became My Unexpected Priority
excerpt: The model was accurate. The data it was trained on wasn't. Before ML can detect anomalies, someone has to decide which anomalies were real and which were system artefacts. That decision is audit work — and it's being skipped.
